subject: Rollcall reply (hub down, via CollabMsg)
body:
WHAT: Idle. Last session closed 2026-04-09. Phase 2 rename (via-openclaw → booker) still on HOLD. ORGANIZER-SHORTNAME-DESIGN is informational-only for me (generation=AIDI, persistence=Fulton, UI=Sarah). ai-discovered re-org awaiting AIDI scope.
BLOCKERS: (1) Phase 2 gated on Phase 1 GREEN + Ybotman Q1/Q2/Q3 option-lock + 5-commit push authorization. (2) ai-discovered re-org — AIDI hasn't broadcast backup plan/scope; needs to clarify overlap with RENAME-PLAN-FINAL-2026-04-09.md.
FOR-TOBY: (1) Bless/revise/kill ORGANIZER-SHORTNAME-DESIGN.md — you said you'd read morning of 4/10. (2) Q1/Q2/Q3 answers to unblock Phase 2 rename (option lock + push auth for 5 unpushed inner-repo commits). (3) Confirm whether re-org subsumes Phase 2 rename or runs separately.
NOTE: persona hub MCP disconnected at my end — reply via CollabMsg or restart hub.
